parameters.name: blend
parameters.label: Blend Factor
parameters.description: This value determines the blend transition between consecutive geometry inputs. Values between 0 and 1 will control the metamorphosis between geometry input 1 and 2, values between 1 and 2 will contro

parameters.name: dopos
parameters.label: Blend Position
parameters.description: If checked, only point xyz positions are blended.

parameters.name: doup
parameters.label: Blend Up
parameters.description: When checked, the Up Vector of the geometry inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels.
